_comment: SLICE_S5_CONTRACT.md §4 -- admin-host tunables. PHASE 2 (real row seeding, this pass): every key below has a REAL S5 consumer as of this pass (cookie lifetime, revalidation interval, the §5 quota cap, the executor's four-eyes step, the 13A retention verb) -- none is pending. Bounds seeded verbatim into ConfigEntryEntity.BoundsJson so ConfigBounds.ValidateAsync's generic check has real data on the actual SetValue path (OPS-3).

entries.consumer: Svac.DomainCore.Quota.QuotaService.Consume (10A `quota.<quotaKey>.cap` convention, QuotaService.cs:24) for quotaKey=AdminQuotaKeys.UserSearchDaily="admin.user_search.daily" (SLICE_S5_CONTRACT.md §5) — the actual runtime key UserSearchExecutionService's quota check resolves. Renamed from the contract §4 table's literal `admin.user_search_daily_cap` (a Pass D build-phase fix, mirroring backend/tests/Svac.Tests.AimlRouter/BudgetCapConfigKeyWiringTests.cs's identical S2 fix for `aiml.call.daily`, pinned here by backend/tests/Svac.Tests.AdminHost/UserSearchQuotaCapConfigKeyWiringTests.cs): that spelling collided with nothing QuotaService.Consume ever reads, so every search would have thrown KeyNotFoundException the moment Pass D wired the real Consume call. Same v0 value (500), same scope/requiresReason — the fix is the key's spelling, not its shape.
13A retention_expiry Pseudonymize verb for deactivated admin.staff_accounts rows (§6)
